headline: Con Edison Announces $2 Billion At-The-Market (ATM) Equity Offering Program
summary: NEW YORK - Consolidated Edison, Inc. today announced a $2 billion ATM equity offering program pursuant to which it may sell its common shares . Con Edison has entered into an Equity Distribution...

headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on Consolidated Edison, Lowers Price Target to $107
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $110 to $107.
